channel.title: summarizedStoriesMainNLpolitics
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from summarizedStoriesMainNLpolitics, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Kennedy Center board to appeal judge's order to remove Trump's name
item.description: The Kennedy Center will appeal a judge's ruling requiring President Trump's name to be removed from the performing arts center.

item.title: Details of the Iran deal Trump says he is ready to sign
item.description: The U.S.-Iran agreement President Trump says will soon be signed requires the Strait of Hormuz to reopen immediately without tolls.

item.title: How the UFC conquered Trump's Washington, says Dana White
item.description: Dana White says he sells "holy sh*t moments for a living." This Sunday, the UFC CEO aims for his biggest moment on the largest stage in combat sports.

item.title: Hispanic Caucus spends heavily to save chair from Mamdani-backed challenger
item.description: The Congressional Hispanic Caucus's political arm is quietly pouring large sums into helping its chair, Rep. Adriano Espaillat (D-N.Y.), fend off a challenger.
